instructions.siteEligible: true if the study should appear anywhere on the website for LM patients; false otherwise
instructions.rationale: Short evidence-based note from the ClinicalTrials.gov record

reviews.briefTitle: Ocrelizumab Effects on Physiological and Cognitive Changes in Multiple Sclerosis
reviews.rationale: Multiple sclerosis ocrelizumab study; condition is MS, not cancer or leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Detection of CSF Next Generation Sequencing in the Application of Brain Metastases From Lung Adenocarcinoma or Meningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Eligibility and condition text specify lung adenocarcinoma with brain (meningeal) metastasis / meningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Concurrent Involved-field Radiotherapy and Intrathecal Chemotherapy for Leptomeningeal Metastases From Solid Tumors
reviews.rationale: Requires definite leptomeningeal metastasis from a malignant solid tumor, excluding hematologic malignancy and primary brain tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Pembrolizumab in Patients With Leptomeningeal Disease
reviews.rationale: Pembrolizumab trial requires cytologically confirmed or radiologically detectable LMD in histologically/cytologically confirmed solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Pemetrexed for Recurrent Leptomeningeal Metastases From Non-small Cell Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: Intrathecal pemetrexed study is for recurrent leptomeningeal metastases from non-small cell lung cancer.

reviews.briefTitle: Study in Leptomeningeal Metastases of Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: Study is specifically in leptomeningeal metastases of breast cancer.

reviews.briefTitle: Study of AZD9291 in NSCLC Patients Harboring T790M Mutation Who Failed EGFR TKI and With Brain and/or LMS
reviews.rationale: Eligibility covers NSCLC with brain and/or leptomeningeal metastasis and EGFR T790M mutation.

reviews.briefTitle: 131I-omburtamab Radioimmunotherapy for Neuroblastoma Central Nervous System/Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Neuroblastoma CNS/leptomeningeal metastases trial; pediatric solid tumor LM population.

reviews.briefTitle: A Study to Assess the Safety and Tolerability of AZD1390 Given With Radiation Therapy in Patients With Brain Cancer
reviews.rationale: Protocol includes recurrent/primary GBM and a solid-tumor arm that allows brain lesions with LMD-related criteria.

reviews.briefTitle: Tucatinib, Trastuzumab, and Capecitabine for the Treatment of HER2+ LMD
reviews.rationale: HER2+ metastatic breast cancer trial with explicit leptomeningeal disease eligibility.

reviews.briefTitle: Concurrent Intrathecal-pemetrexed and Involved-field Radiotherapy for Leptomeningeal Metastasis From Solid Tumors
reviews.rationale: Concurrent intrathecal pemetrexed and radiotherapy for leptomeningeal metastasis from solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Study of Proton Radiation to the Brain and Spinal Cord for Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Proton craniospinal irradiation study requires solid-tumor leptomeningeal metastases established radiographically and/or by CSF cytology.

reviews.briefTitle: Teriflunomide Tecfidera LMCE
reviews.rationale: Multiple sclerosis medication review; no cancer or leptomeningeal metastasis population.

reviews.briefTitle: Short-term Effects of TOLCAPONE on Transthyretin Stability in Subjects With Leptomeningeal TTR Amyloidosis (ATTR)
reviews.rationale: Leptomeningeal transthyretin amyloidosis, which is non-malignant and outside LM metastasis scope.

reviews.briefTitle: ANG1005 in Leptomeningeal Disease From Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: ANG1005 trial is for leptomeningeal disease from breast cancer.

reviews.briefTitle: EGFR806-specific CAR T Cell Locoregional Immunotherapy for EGFR-positive Recurrent or Refractory Pediatric CNS Tumors
reviews.rationale: Pediatric CNS tumor CAR-T study; no leptomeningeal metastasis population in eligibility.

reviews.briefTitle: BATs in Patients With Breast Cancer and Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer trial requires leptomeningeal metastasis by imaging and/or CSF cytology.

reviews.briefTitle: LTA Pilot Study of Glucarpidase in Patients With Central Nervous System Lymphoma
reviews.rationale: Study is for CNS lymphoma involving the leptomeningeal space, but it is not a leptomeningeal metastasis trial for solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: HER2-CAR T Cells in Treating Patients With Recurrent Brain or Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: HER2-CAR T study allows recurrent brain or leptomeningeal metastases and the condition list is breast-cancer based.

reviews.briefTitle: Afatinib on CNS Metastases and LMD in EGFR Mutation Positive NSCLC
reviews.rationale: Afatinib study is for EGFR-mutant NSCLC with CNS metastases and LMD.

reviews.briefTitle: Avelumab With Radiotherapy in Patients With Leptomeningeal Disease
reviews.rationale: Avelumab plus radiotherapy trial enrolls patients with LMD from any histologically confirmed cancer except leukemia.

reviews.briefTitle: Analyses of Exosomes in the Cerebrospinal Fluid for Breast Cancer Patients With Suspicion of Leptomeningeal Metastasis.
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer patients with suspected leptomeningeal metastasis are eligible.

reviews.briefTitle: Osimertinib With or Without Bevacizumab for EGFR- Mutant Non-small Cell Lung Cancer With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Osimertinib trial requires NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Tomotherapy for Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Tomotherapy study is for leptomeningeal metastases from solid tumors, without a specific primary site.

reviews.briefTitle: Study of B7-H3-Specific CAR T Cell Locoregional Immunotherapy for Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma/Diffuse Midline Glioma and Recurrent or Refractory Pediatric Central Nervous System Tumors
reviews.rationale: B7-H3 CAR-T study is for DIPG/DMG and other pediatric CNS tumors, not LM disease.

reviews.briefTitle: GDC-0084 With Radiation Therapy for People With PIK3CA-Mutated Solid Tumor Brain Metastases or Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: GDC-0084 plus radiation allows solid tumors with brain metastases and/or leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Study of Osimertinib in Patients with a Lung Cancer with Brain or Leptomeningeal Metastases with EGFR Mutation
reviews.rationale: Osimertinib study is in lung cancer with brain or leptomeningeal metastases and EGFR mutation.

reviews.briefTitle: Testing of the Anti Cancer Drugs CB-839 HCl (Telaglenastat) and MLN0128 (Sapanisertib) in Advanced Stage Non-small Cell Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: Advanced NSCLC trial explicitly allows stable treated asymptomatic brain metastases or leptomeningeal disease.

reviews.briefTitle: 177Lu-DTPA-Omburtamab Radioimmunotherapy for Leptomeningeal Metastasis From Solid Tumors (Breast, NSCLC, Malignant Melanoma)
reviews.rationale: Eligibility is limited to breast cancer, non-small cell lung cancer, or malignant melanoma with LM.

reviews.briefTitle: Proton Craniospinal Radiation Therapy vs. Partial Photon Radiation Therapy for Leptomeningeal Metastasis From Solid Tumors
reviews.rationale: Randomized radiation study for leptomeningeal metastasis from solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Efficacy and Safety of Recombinant Human Endostatin in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Non-small cell lung cancer with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Efficacy and Safety of Durvalumab in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Non-small cell lung cancer with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: DS-8201a for trEatment of aBc, BRain Mets, And Her2[+] Disease
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer study includes a cohort for leptomeningeal carcinomatosis / LM.

reviews.briefTitle: Osimertinib With Bevacizumab for Leptomeningeal Metastasis From EGFR-mutation Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: EGFR-mutant NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Imaging SARS-CoV-2 Involvement of Leptomeninges, Olfactory and Limbic Areas
reviews.rationale: COVID-19 imaging study of leptomeningeal involvement, not a cancer LM trial.

reviews.briefTitle: Testing the Addition of an Anti-cancer Drug, Adavosertib, to Radiation Therapy for Patients With Incurable Esophageal and Gastroesophageal Junction Cancers
reviews.rationale: Esophageal/GEJ cancer trial explicitly allows patients with new or progressive brain metastases or leptomeningeal disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Efficacy and Safety of 80mg Osimertinib in Patients With Non-small Cell Lung Cancer(NSCLC)
reviews.rationale: NSCLC osimertinib study requires at least one LM site by investigator assessment.

reviews.briefTitle: Radiation Therapy Followed by Intrathecal Trastuzumab/Pertuzumab in HER2+ Breast Leptomeningeal Disease
reviews.rationale: HER2+ breast cancer with leptomeningeal disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Brain Tumor-Specific Immune Cells (IL13Ralpha2-CAR T Cells) for the Treatment of Leptomeningeal Glioblastoma, Ependymoma, or Medulloblastoma
reviews.rationale: CAR-T trial is for leptomeningeal glioblastoma and related primary CNS tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Pembrolizumab And Lenvatinib In Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Trial enrolls any solid malignancy with confirmed leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: A Dose Exploration Study of Almonertinib for EGFRm NSCLC Patients With Brain/Leptomeningeal Metastasis (ARTISTRY)
reviews.rationale: NSCLC study includes a queue for patients with tumor cells in CSF or MRI meningeal enhancement.

reviews.briefTitle: Clinical Efficacy and Safety of EGFR-TKI Combined With Nimotuzumab in the Treatment of Leptomeningeal Metastases From Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: Leptomeningeal metastases from lung cancer.

reviews.briefTitle: Almonertinib With Bevacizumab for EGFR-Mutant NSCLC Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: EGFR-mutant NSCLC with cytology-confirmed leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Patient Perceptions Around Quality of Care Through Telemedicine in Neuro-Oncology
reviews.rationale: Broad neuro-oncology telemedicine survey includes LM among many CNS tumors, but it is not LM-specific.

reviews.briefTitle: Intraventricular Administration of Rhenium-186 NanoLiposome for Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Intraventricular rhenium study is for type 1 and 2 leptomeningeal metastases of any primary type.

reviews.briefTitle: The Efficacy and Safety of Brain-targeting Immune Cells (EGFRvIII-CAR T Cells) in Treating Patients With Leptomeningeal Disease From Glioblastoma. Administering Patients EGFRvIII -CAR T Cells May Help to Recognize and Destroy Brain Tumor Cells in Patients
reviews.rationale: Study is for leptomeningeal disease from glioblastoma.
